Name: BloodInStool
Title: Blood in Stool
Descriptino: This value set includes concepts for the presence of blood in stool. Includes concepts for signs of blood in stool, including melena and hematoschezia. Excludes concepts for Blood in stool due to inflammatory bowel disease, hematoma, or neonatal/perinatal.

Name: NonBleedingColorectalSignsSymptoms
Title: Non Bleeding Colorectal Cancer Signs and Symptoms
Descriptino: Concepts for non-bleeding signs and symptoms often associated with colorectal cancer. Includes diarrhea, constipation, tenesmus, abdominal pain or cramping, fatigue or weakness, unintended or unexplained weight loss, change in bowel habits or stool shape.
